title: danthoniastrum neumayerianum
intro: Danthoniastrum neumayerianum, also known as the Alpine Hair-grass or Wood Grass, is a species of flowering plant in the grass family Poaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help in reducing swelling, pain, and preventing infections. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving coughs, and aiding in digestion. Danthoniastrum neumayerianum is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion by steeping its roots or leaves in hot water to make a herbal tea or used in tincture form for medicinal purposes.
